results.evidence: train.py line 44: os.environ['PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF'] = 'expandable_segments:True' — correctly set before any torch import
config.py line 275: MIXED_PRECISION=True; train.py line 736 & 821: amp.autocast('cuda', enabled=C.MIXED_PRECISION) wraps forward pass for both main and PSR sequence batches

results.description: No CUDA OOM during forward/backward pass
results.evidence: train.py lines 2096-2120: full OOM retry loop — on CUDA OOM, val_batch halved, workers→0, max_batches halved, with empty_cache() + gc.collect() before retry. Max 4 retries.

results.description: GPU memory released correctly after validation
results.evidence: train.py lines 2121-2124 (finally block): del val_loader + gc.collect() + torch.cuda.empty_cache() always executes after evaluate_all(). Also ema.restore() at line 2127 restores weights after val.

train.py: empty_cache() called: (1) every 10 batches inside training loop (line ~685), (2) inside NaN skip guard (lines 715, 776, 793), (3) before val start (lines 2053, 2058, 2060), (4) inside val OOM retry loop (line 2114), (5) after val finally block (line 2124)

results.description: PIN_MEMORY enabled for faster CPU-GPU transfers
results.evidence: config.py line 274: PIN_MEMORY=True; train.py line 221: pin_memory=C.PIN_MEMORY passed to DataLoader; _build_loader() correctly passes pin_memory to DataLoader constructor

results.description: TF32 matmul enabled for faster computation
results.evidence: config.py line 309: ALLOW_TF32=True; train.py lines 155-156: torch.backends.cuda.matmul.allow_tf32 = bool(getattr(C, 'ALLOW_TF32', True)) and torch.backends.cudnn.allow_tf32 = bool(getattr(C, 'ALLOW_TF32', True)) — both set in seed_everything() called at startup

results.description: Memory usage logged periodically (GPU mem watchdog)
results.evidence: train.py lines 686-689: GPU memory watchdog logs allocated+reserved GB every 10 batches (step > 0 && step % 10 == 0). Also CPU RAM watchdog every 50 batches (lines ~1990+) and DataLoader worker health check every 100 batches.

summary: All 8 GPU memory & mixed precision items verified PASS. expandable_segments configured pre-import, MIXED_PRECISION=True with autocast guards on both main and PSR sequence forward passes, OOM retry loop with exponential backoff present, memory released in finally block post-validation, empty_cache() called at all appropriate points (batch boundaries, NaN guards, pre/post val), PIN_MEMORY=True in config and DataLoader, TF32 enabled via seed_everything(), GPU memory watchdog logs every 10 batches with allocated+reserved GB.
